title: Intricately Spiced Peruvian Potatoes Papa Rellena
description: A mustardy and pillowy festive Peruvian dish featuring red chilli flakes, fry-grind-rice-khao-khua, and shojin-friendly ingredients, formed into papa rellena
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Boil the chopped potatoes until they are tender, then mash and set aside.
In a pan, heat the olive oil and saute the chopped onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the red chilli flakes, mustard, and ground khao khuat to the pan and stir to combine.
Mix the cooked rice into the pan and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the mashed potatoes to the pan and stir to combine with the rice and spice mixture.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into papa rellena forms.
Place the papa rellena on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Serve the papa rellena hot, garnished with additional red chilli flakes if desired.
